ITTF Certified

Professional Table Tennis Flooring Solutions

ITTF certified table tennis flooring engineered for superior grip, optimal ball bounce, and exceptional player comfort. Perfect for professional tournaments and training facilities.

01615550098

ITTF Certified Excellence

Racquet sports, mainly table tennis, require the floor to find a balance between grip and slip, allowing players to perform better in frequent acceleration and direction changes. Our ITTF certified table tennis flooring provides the right answers with superior grip when sliding and excellent shock absorption.

ITTF Certified and approved
Superior grip and slide balance
Optimal ball bounce characteristics
Double density closed-cell foam backing
Excellent shock absorption
Professional-grade quality

Product Range

Choose from our professional table tennis flooring options, each engineered for optimal performance.

18313

Design:Uni Design
Format:Rolls
Specification:4.5mm x 1.8m x 20m

58313

Design:Uni Design
Format:Rolls
Specification:4.5mm x 1.8m x 20m

58513

Design:Uni Design
Format:Rolls
Specification:4.5mm x 1.8m x 20m

BK5561

Design:Uni Design
Format:Rolls
Specification:5.5mm x 1.8m x 20m

Advanced Technology

Our table tennis flooring features cutting-edge technology for professional performance.

Glaze+ Surface Treatment

Advanced surface treatment for superior grip and performance characteristics.

DW Tech Fibreglass Grid

Reinforced fibreglass grid for enhanced durability and stability.

Double Density Foam Backing

HD tech closed-cell foam provides excellent shock absorption and comfort.

ITTF Certified

Meets all international standards for professional table tennis competition.

Technical Specifications

Comprehensive details about our table tennis flooring specifications and features.

Surface Treatment

  • Glaze+ Surface Treatment
  • Enhanced grip characteristics
  • Professional finish

Construction

  • DW Tech Fibreglass Grid
  • Double density closed-cell foam
  • HD tech backing

Performance

  • ITTF Certified
  • Optimal ball bounce
  • Superior lateral friction

Durability

  • Professional-grade materials
  • Long-lasting performance
  • Easy maintenance
